chief_complaint: A 45-year-old patient presents with upper abdominal discomfort for the past 3 days.
history: The patient is a chronic alcoholic with a previous history of recurrent pancreatitis. Investigation revealed raised serum amylase and lipase levels.
exam: Vital signs and physical examination findings are not provided.
labs: Raised serum amylase and lipase levels. Computed tomography showing a well-defined intrasplenic lesion.
